privileged_info_summary: The dataset used for this task is a real multi-frame X-Ray Angiography sample downloaded from Rubo Medical (0002.DCM), contradicting the prompt's claim of a 'batch of CT DICOM files'. The data is pre-processed by setup scripts which inject specific metadata errors into the DICOM file. The scripts overwrite the original PatientSex tag (M) with 'F', and forcibly set BodyPartExamined to 'HEAD' and ReferringPhysicianName to an empty string (the latter two tags were originally missing from the downloaded file). The expected correct values according to the baseline extraction are 'M' for sex, 'ABDOMEN' for body part, and 'Dr. Smith' for the physician, though the verifier allows any reasonable body part (e.g., ABDOMEN, CHEST) and any non-empty string for the physician. The corrected DICOM files must be placed in /home/ga/DICOM/studies/renal_audit/ and a text audit report describing the corrections must be written to /home/ga/DICOM/exports/metadata_audit_report.txt.
